title: MRC Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) Annual Report FY2023
description: Annual report of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) for fiscal year 2023 (July 1, 2022 – June 30, 2023). The SRC is the federally mandated advisory body to MRC's Vocational Rehabilitation division; this report reviews VR program outcomes and presents the council's committee reports and FY24 recommendations. Prose report converted to Markdown.

source.title: MRC Statewide Rehabilitation Council Annual Report 2023
